commands.summary: Unchanged 180-second timeout waiting for getByLabel('Location', { exact: true }); accessibility tree still exposed combobox Location

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: The exact label option remained unable to resolve the implicitly wrapped select because label text includes descendant option text, while the accessibility tree exposes an exact combobox named Location. No later mutation ran.
remaining_blockers: Judge authorization of the exact role-and-accessible-name Location combobox selector
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.stopped_because: A different semantic locator is required, but T044 permitted only exact:true on getByLabel.
